sys_script_include.description:
Intelligent Build Agent Selection Engine
Analyzes requirements and selects optimal build agent based on: - Token cost efficiency (input/output pricing) - Output quality benchmarks - Response speed metrics - Task type specialization - Context window requirements
Selection Algorithm: 1. Parse requirement to determine task type 2. Estimate token count for context 3. Filter agents by context window compatibility 4. Score agents by weighted criteria: - quality_weight * quality_score - token_cost_weight * (1 / normalized_cost) - speed_weight * speed_score - specialization_bonus if task matches 5. Return highest scoring agent with reasoning
sys_script_include.name: BuildAgentSelector
